content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the Playwright test configuration and setup in apps/org-next. I need to understand:

1. The playwright.config.ts configuration
2. Any global setup/teardown files for Playwright
3. How the dev server is started for tests
4. Any test fixtures or custom test setup
5. How environment variables are configured for tests (especially API URLs)
6. Look for any .env.test or similar files

Also look at apps/org-next/src/server/app-bootstrap.ts (or appBootstrap.ts) to understand how the app initializes and whether MSW is started there.

Return the full contents of all relevant files.
</user_query>

Exploring Playwright configuration and related files in `apps/org-next`.
